overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a long coat and hat walking along a dirt trail through a rocky forest landscape. The scene features overcast lighting, dense vegetation, and occasional encounters with horses and other characters.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest trail between large boulders

events.description: a horse with rider passes quickly by on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through rocky terrain, wearing a long coat and hat

notable_agents.action: horse with rider galloping past on the left side of the trail

entered.detail: massive gray rock formation covered in patches of moss and vegetation
tall rocky cliff face with scattered trees on top
tall evergreen trees visible in the distance against the overcast sky
narrow winding dirt path with patches of grass and mud

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail flanked by massive rock outcrops on both sides. The environment is an open rocky forest with scattered pine trees visible in the distance under an overcast sky. At approximately 9 seconds, a horse and rider pass by on the left, briefly entering and exiting the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: open woodland clearing with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the rocky terrain gives way to more open grassland

entered.detail: medium-sized deciduous trees with green foliage scattered across the clearing
grassy area with wildflowers and tall grass replacing the rocky ground

segments.scene_description: The trail opens up into a more spacious woodland clearing as the large rock formations recede into the distance. The ground becomes grassier with scattered oak trees lining the left side of the path. The character continues walking forward through this transitional zone between rocky outcrops and denser forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest path with steep rocky hillside

events.description: entering denser forest area with canopy cover and steeper terrain on the right

agents.ego_description: walking into a darker, more enclosed forest section with dense tree cover overhead

entered.detail: thick overhead tree cover blocking much of the sky, creating darker lighting conditions
steep rocky slope covered in moss and small vegetation rising on the right side

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions into a denser forest section with a steep rocky hillside rising on the right. The tree canopy becomes thicker, blocking more of the overcast sky and creating a darker, more enclosed atmosphere. The trail narrows as it winds through the dense vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with companion and horses

events.description: a companion character joins from the right and begins walking alongside

agents.ego_description: walking alongside a companion who joined from the right, with horses following behind

notable_agents.action: companion character in red shirt and hat walking alongside the ego character
horses being led along the trail behind the companion

segments.scene_description: A companion character joins from the right side of the frame and walks alongside the main character through the dense forest trail. Horses follow behind the group, and the path continues winding through the shaded, rocky terrain. The scene maintains the enclosed forest atmosphere with steep slopes on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt trail that transforms from an open rocky corridor into a dense, enclosed forest. It begins with the character walking between massive rock outcrops under an overcast sky, as a horse and rider briefly pass by on the left. As the rock formations recede, the trail opens into a spacious woodland clearing with grassier ground and scattered oak trees lining the path. The scene then shifts into a denser forest section where a steep rocky hillside rises on the right and a thickening canopy creates a darker, more enclosed atmosphere. Finally, a companion joins from the right to walk alongside the main character, with horses following behind as the group winds through the shaded, rocky terrain.
